narrative:
Washington County has 40,946 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.8% of registrants.
